rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"details":"Signature verification helper that can be used instead of `ECDSA.recover` to signatures from keys that do not have an Ethereum address of their own See https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-1271[ERC-1271] and
